prompt: Update the documentation for our client side plugins. We added a new mapping in the properties file: Document.EngineeringDoc.CREATE_DOCUMENT.CLASSIFY.handleWidgetEvent=/acme/jsp/doc/widgetEng_CSP.jsp — make sure the RTM reflects it.
